subcodes.first_line: Say: In the name of God and by God! Take thou the chalice of utterance in the name of thy Lord, the All-Merciful, then drink therefrom in My Name [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل باسم الله و بالله و خذ قدح البیان باسم ربک الرحمن ثم اشرب منه تاره باسمی و
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @proclamation to people of the Bayan
